items.name: utils
items.title: Utils
items.description: Utility functions for elorm/ui components.

items.name: ui-styles
items.title: UI Styles
items.description: Shared Elorm style utilities for consistent component styling.

items.name: button
items.title: Button
items.description: Displays a button or a component that looks like a button.

items.name: input
items.title: Input
items.description: Displays a form input field.

items.name: textarea
items.title: Textarea
items.description: Displays a form textarea.

items.name: label
items.title: Label
items.description: Renders an accessible label associated with controls.

items.name: checkbox
items.title: Checkbox
items.description: A control that allows the user to toggle between checked and not checked.

items.name: switch
items.title: Switch
items.description: A control that allows the user to toggle between checked and not checked.

items.name: select
items.title: Select
items.description: Displays a list of options for the user to pick from.

items.name: dialog
items.title: Dialog
items.description: A window overlaid on either the primary window or another dialog window.

items.name: sheet
items.title: Sheet
items.description: Extends the Dialog component to display content that complements the main content.

items.name: dropdown-menu
items.title: Dropdown Menu
items.description: Displays a menu to the user triggered by a button.

items.name: tooltip
items.title: Tooltip
items.description: A popup that displays information related to an element.

items.name: card
items.title: Card
items.description: Displays a card with header, content, and footer.

items.name: badge
items.title: Badge
items.description: Displays a badge or a component that looks like a badge.

items.name: social-links
items.title: Social Links
items.description: A row of monochrome social media icon links.

items.name: separator
items.title: Separator
items.description: Visually or semantically separates content.

items.name: skeleton
items.title: Skeleton
items.description: Use to show a placeholder while content is loading.

items.name: empty-state
items.title: Empty State
items.description: A block for displaying empty or no-results states.

items.name: stat-card
items.title: Stat Card
items.description: A dashboard stat card with optional trend indicator.

items.name: page-header
items.title: Page Header
items.description: A page header block with title, description, actions, and breadcrumbs.

items.name: field
items.title: Field
items.description: Composable form field layout with label, description, and error.

items.name: input-group
items.title: Input Group
items.description: Group inputs with addons for search bars and compound fields.

items.name: spinner
items.title: Spinner
items.description: Loading indicator for buttons and async states.

items.name: radio-group
items.title: Radio Group
items.description: A set of checkable buttons where only one can be checked.

items.name: toggle-group
items.title: Toggle Group
items.description: A set of two-state buttons that can be toggled on or off.

items.name: tabs
items.title: Tabs
items.description: A set of layered sections of content displayed one at a time.

items.name: alert
items.title: Alert
items.description: Displays a callout for user attention.

items.name: avatar
items.title: Avatar
items.description: An image element with a fallback for representing the user.

items.name: popover
items.title: Popover
items.description: Displays rich content in a portal, triggered by a button.

items.name: alert-dialog
items.title: Alert Dialog
items.description: A modal dialog that interrupts the user with important content.

items.name: progress
items.title: Progress
items.description: Displays an indicator showing the completion progress of a task.

items.name: table
items.title: Table
items.description: A responsive table component.

items.name: pagination
items.title: Pagination
items.description: Pagination with page navigation, next and previous links.

items.name: breadcrumb
items.title: Breadcrumb
items.description: Displays the path to the current resource using a hierarchy of links.

items.name: accordion
items.title: Accordion
items.description: A vertically stacked set of interactive headings.

items.name: collapsible
items.title: Collapsible
items.description: An interactive component which expands/collapses a panel.

items.name: login-form
items.title: Login Form
items.description: A sign-in form block with email and password fields.

items.name: settings-section
items.title: Settings Section
items.description: A settings page block with tabs and toggle switches.

items.name: data-table
items.title: Data Table
items.description: A searchable data table with pagination.
